falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4000 (key support level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breakdown below critical support invalidates the bottom pattern and suggests continued decline, not a reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: CBOE VIX spikes above 30 (20% increase from current level) for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility surge indicates market panic and distribution, contradicting the 'hold' signal's implied stability

falsification_conditions.condition: Federal Reserve announces 50-basis-point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Unprecedented monetary stimulus would invalidate the blowoff score's implication of imminent liquidity crunch

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
